title: Broken Tool
description:
A Minecraft mod that replace tools as they break.

It also replace your active stack during build is there is the same type of block in the player inventory.

If you want this mod to be updated on next minecraft release, please consider to donate !
body:
A Minecraft mod that replace tools as they break.

It will attempt to find a tool made of the same material first. If none are found, it will replace it with the first tool of the same type found in the inventory.
